categories.name: prompts_user
categories.description: asks user to put some sort of input to continue

categories.name: adds_env_var
categories.description: adds an environment variable necessary to be used in order to run the project, which the benchmark doesn't know about

categories.name: truncated
categories.description: truncated early and stopped generation halfway

categories.name: empty_tool_call
categories.description: tool call called doesn't have any body

categories.name: confident_without_checking
categories.description: doesn't check the generated code and assumes it works correctly

categories.name: uses_git_after_done
categories.description: uses git after being done with the task for additional unnecessary actions

categories.name: tool_knowledge
categories.description: related to not knowing enough about how certain tool works, like kafka

categories.name: api_mismatch
categories.description: the unseen test which is added, expects a different api, hence Value Errors, Attribute Erros, and Assertion Errors in a few cases can be seen in the tests

categories.name: over_engineering
categories.description: Does unwanted extra work that leads to breaking of the code

categories.name: too_big_task
categories.description: The task is unrealisticly big that makes the LLM either reach its context or the LLM does half of the work

categories.name: reasoning_action_mismatch
categories.description: reasoning content and the action followed do not match

categories.name: preexisting_failures
categories.description: some tests that are already failing confuses the LLM, and eats up the context window and the LLM hallucinates or forgets

categories.name: syntax_error
categories.description: the LLM led to a syntax error that failed the test

categories.name: reasoning_loop
categories.description: gets stuck in reasoning, and keeps repeating itself till it dies

categories.name: uses_unavailable_package
categories.description: uses a package that is not installed

categories.name: requires_login_to_3rdparty
categories.description: the code requires login to 3rd party to download requirements like huggingface or dockerhub
